---
title: "Figure 5: Label transfer benchmarking"
author: "Reproducibility pipeline"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(),'%e %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
wd <- normalizePath(getwd(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = wd)
```

# Load results

```{r}
metrics_path <- file.path(wd, "results/label_transfer/label_transfer_metrics.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(metrics_path))
metrics <- read.csv(metrics_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
metrics %>% arrange(desc(accuracy)) %>% head(10)
```

# Accuracy by classifier

```{r}
metrics %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(classifier, accuracy, median, na.rm = TRUE), y = accuracy)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Accuracy", title = "Label transfer performance")
```
